roa.docketEntryComment: DEFTS ADD TO CALENDAR TO BE RE-SENTENCED FILED

/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY SENTENCE AS TO COUNTY JAIL/MO GRTD/CTORD :THE 20 DAYS COUNTY JAIL THRU SWAP VACATED/X:THE COURT MODIFIES THE DEFENDANT'S PROBATION AS FOLLOWS:/DEF: IS ORDERED TO PERFORM 60 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE THRU PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION IN LIEU OF THE COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE/X:THE 5 DAYS OF CTS REMAINS AS SET,/ /X: ALL OF THE OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONOF PROBATION REMAINS AS SET,/X:THE FOLLOWING OCCURRED OFF THE RECORD (COURT DATE):/CONTD:PTD PROGRESS REPORT RE COMMUNITY SERVICE/DOPU:PTD/

/CAL:DEFEDANT'S ADD TO CALENDAR TO RE-SENTENCE DEFENDANT/DAWT/X:VISITING JUDGE YNOSTROZA SENTENCED THE DEFENDANT ON 06-11-14 AND   ORDERED SWAP,  HOWEVER, THE DEFENDANT IS INELIGBLE FOR SWAP,/X:AT THIS TIME, THE DEFENDANT IS NOT EXPECTED TO COMPLETE SWAP,/X:THE TERMSAND CONDITIONS OF PROBATION REMAINS AS SET,/CONTD:RE-SENTENCE THE DEFENDANT/DOPC/X:PROPOSED RE-SENTENCE: THE COURT WILL CONVERT THE CJ TO 60 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE HOURS, BUTWILL BE DONE WHEN THE DEFENDANT IS PRESENT,/

/TWS/CH2:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 20D/CTS:5/4019HALF/SWAPD:06-12-14/FOP1:3 MONTH/LVAL/LCHEM/PF390 12/VF2:150/OR25/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/1463ALC/CITE/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BYREFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/REMA/X:AS PART ON THIS NEGOTIATED PLEA, THE PEOPLE AGREE TO WITHDRAW THEMOTIONTO REVOKED FILED ON 05-01-14 AND ANY PENDING MOTION TO REVOKE IN CASE#12017146,/
/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:COMMUNITY SERVICE COMPLETED PER PTD, DEF IS TO CONTINUE ON PROBATION/
/CAL: PTD PROG RPT/DAWT/CONTD:PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:PTD
/CAL:DISPO/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFTADV NL: 2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/
